creator: jacula@gmail.com
text:
Hi all,

this patch is related to the pr:

ports/128344: [MAINTAINER UPDATE]: print/hs-hscolour version 1.10.1
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128344

I'd like to take advantage of this message to get some information about
the situation and the schedule, if any :-), of this pr.

Bye Jacula Modyun

>Fix:

--- patch-bsd.haskell.mk begins here ---
--- bsd.haskell.mk.orig	2008-10-24 07:48:24.000000000 +0000
+++ bsd.haskell.mk	2008-10-24 07:49:52.000000000 +0000
@@ -1382,7 +1382,7 @@
 HADDOCK_INTERFACES?=	${HADDOCK_INTERFACE}
 
 ## Hscolour related things.
-HSCOLOUR_VERSION?=	1.10
+HSCOLOUR_VERSION?=	1.10.1
 HSCOLOUR_DATADIR?=	${LOCALBASE}/share/hscolour-${HSCOLOUR_VERSION}
 HSCOLOUR_CSS?=		${HSCOLOUR_DATADIR}/hscolour.css
 
--- patch-bsd.haskell.mk ends here ---
